reasoning: Do not process the refund. The order record contains a clear FRAUD ALERT instructing to escalate to Loss Prevention. The customer has an extensive refund history (14 refunds in 55 days, 88% refund rate, all prior claims disproven by delivery tracking), indicating high fraud risk. Per internal policy and the explicit note on this order, this request must be escalated to Loss Prevention for investigation rather than approved or denied outright.
